title: MLB Confirmed Board
subtitle: Day-of board after starter, lineup, and weather checks are live.

pick_of_day.summary: Starter, weather, and lineup slot are confirmed, so the outlook penalty comes off and the lane tightens.

rows.why: The same lane moves from projected to core once the uncertainty penalty disappears.
Cleaner than the outlook board because the lineup and matchup details are now fixed.

games.note: Confirmed Board removes the uncertainty tax and keeps only the matchup, weather, park, and lineup adjustments that still matter.
Useful board once the lane stops depending on projected inputs.

notes: Confirmed Board should overwrite Outlook as the primary site board when it exists.
This board is the cleaner decision layer. Trend Board stays separate.
